# Claude Code prompt — [5A] Tendering (PR A) — density as Rates & Lists lookup

*Paste below the line. Generated by Cowork, 2026-05-26.*

---

You are working on `GH-Mantova/ProjectOperations`. Read `CLAUDE.md` and follow it.

## Background

`density` is currently a per-item `Decimal` column on `ScopeOfWorksItem` that
users type into the scope-item form. The owner wants density to be **read-only**,
sourced from a new "Rates & Lists" lookup keyed by material. Single source of
truth; reduces estimator mental load.

## Phase 0

- `git fetch origin`; branch off `main`: `feat/density-rate-lookup`.
- Conflict-check touched files.

## 1. New Prisma model

Add to `apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma`:

```prisma
model EstimateMaterialDensity {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  materialName String   @unique @map("material_name")
  density      Decimal  @db.Decimal(8, 3)
  unit         String   // "kg/m³" or "kg/m²"
  category     String?  // "concrete" | "masonry" | "soil" | "sheet" | "metal" | "timber"
  notes        String?
  active       Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
  @@map("estimate_material_density")
}
```

Migration: `20260527_estimate_material_density`. Pure additive.

## 2. Seed defaults

In `apps/api/prisma/seed.ts`, idempotently upsert these (refinable in admin UI):

| materialName | density | unit | category |
|---|---|---|---|
| Concrete | 2400 | kg/m³ | concrete |
| Reinforced concrete | 2500 | kg/m³ | concrete |
| Brick | 1900 | kg/m³ | masonry |
| Block (concrete) | 2100 | kg/m³ | masonry |
| Asphalt | 2300 | kg/m³ | concrete |
| Soil (dry) | 1500 | kg/m³ | soil |
| Soil (wet) | 1900 | kg/m³ | soil |
| Sand | 1600 | kg/m³ | soil |
| Steel | 7850 | kg/m³ | metal |
| Timber (softwood) | 600 | kg/m³ | timber |
| Plasterboard | 850 | kg/m³ | sheet |
| Carpet | 2 | kg/m² | sheet |
| Glass | 2500 | kg/m³ | sheet |

## 3. API endpoints

Under `/api/v1/estimate-rates/material-densities`:

- `GET` — list all (sort by category, then name).
- `POST` — create.
- `PATCH /:id` — update.
- `DELETE /:id` — soft delete (`active = false`).

Permission guard: use whatever guard the other `EstimateRate` admin endpoints
use (`rates.manage` or similar). Swagger decorators per CLAUDE.md. DTOs with
`class-validator`.

## 4. Admin UI

Find the existing Rates admin page (likely `apps/web/src/pages/admin/RatesPage.tsx`
or similar — grep for `EstimateLabourRate` admin) and add a **Material Densities**
section using the same CRUD pattern as the other rate types. Table + inline
edit + add row + soft-delete affordance.

## 5. Scope-item form change

In `apps/web/src/pages/tendering/ScopeQuantitiesTable.tsx`:

- Add a **Material** dropdown sourced from `GET /estimate-rates/material-densities`
  (filter `active=true`). Place it logically near the existing waste-item
  dropdown / dimension row.
- When the user picks a material:
  - Set `scopeItem.materialType = material.materialName`.
  - Set `scopeItem.density = material.density`.
- The density `<input>` becomes **read-only** (`disabled` + muted styling). Show
  value + unit, e.g. `2400 kg/m³`.
- If no material is selected, density shows `—` / blank.

## 6. Backfill migration

For existing rows in `scope_of_works_items` with `material_type IS NOT NULL`,
look up the matching `estimate_material_density.material_name` case-insensitively
and `UPDATE scope_of_works_items SET density = ed.density WHERE ...`. Rows
without a match keep their existing density value. Log unmatched
materialTypes once at migration end for visibility.

## Tests

- Seed is idempotent and creates the 13 defaults.
- Endpoint CRUD + permission denial.
- Scope-form unit test: pick a material → density populates + becomes read-only.
- Backfill: matching `materialType` updates density; unmatched preserved.
- §6 pre-PR CI checklist green.

## PR

- Title: `[5A] Tendering — density as Rates & Lists lookup`
- Body: schema + seed + admin UI + form change + backfill semantics. §6 checklist
  ticked. Migration file committed in the same commit per CLAUDE.md.
- Reviewer `GH-Mantova`.
- **Do NOT auto-merge.** Owner verifies on a real scope item.

## Scope

Only the density lookup + Material dropdown + admin UI. Do not touch any other
rate type, do not change the dimension override/highlight fields (separate PR).
